doc:
Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_clear_nanflag (mpfr/src/exceptions.c L176-L182). Three-line C body: `__gmpfr_flags &= MPFR_FLAGS_ALL ^ MPFR_FLAGS_NAN` -- clear the NAN bit (bit 2 = 4). C returns void.

The TS port follows the immutable flag-family contract: takes `mask: bigint`, applies the clear-NAN operation, returns the new flag state. In-library wiring goes through clearFlags(MPFR_FLAGS_NAN) from src/internal/mpfr/flags.ts.

Class 'misc'. Tag minimums per Rule 7 apply.
divergence_from_c: Three: (1) return void -> bigint; (2) param void -> mask:bigint; (3) inline `mask & (63n ^ 4n)`.
